title: Martial Arts Man deals 20 damage after your creature hits

card.rawText: On hit, play this card from your hand. Inflict 20 damage to the creature you are battling.

plan.title: Martial Arts Man deals 20 damage after your creature hits
plan.summary: Play Martial Arts Man from hand after a hit and verify it deals 20 effect damage to the battled creature.

notes: Martial Arts Man is in player_1 hand.
Player_1 primary creature hits during battle.

steps: Start battle and force player_1 hit.
Play Martial Arts Man from hand before damage is completed.
Verify 20 damage is applied to the creature being battled.

expectedAssertions.label: Martial Arts Man sent to cemetery

manualVerification: Verify against card text: On hit, play this card from your hand. Inflict 20 damage to the creature you are battling.
